title: bertiera angusiana
intro: Bertiera angusiana, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic and expectorant properties. Bertiera angusiana is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and may also be used to make herbal teas and tonics.
